violations.text: Food items stored in the back 2 Door Reach-In Cooler were observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per the PIC, foods to be stored in the walk-in for proper cold storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026

The back 2 Door Reach-In Cooler was observed to have water dripping into a sheet pan and maintaining an ambient temperature of 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit is to be adjusted/serviced to maintain proper ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026

Ceiling tiles over the dishwashing area were observed to be porous tiles and not smooth, easily cleanable, non-absorbent tiles. The ceiling is to be covered with tiles that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026

At the time of inspection, the 2-door low boy cooler in the front service area was in need of repair/adjustment. The unit was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 48 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC adjusted the unit to colder setting at the time of inspection. (Recently prepped food containers were moved to colder refrigeration.) After adjustment, unit was observed to still be operating at 47-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Use of the unit for Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods is to be discontinued until Serviced/Repaired and maintaining an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
